name: TDLOSK World Roleplay
description:
Welcome to the Saiki K. Universe!

ЛҡКҡвҷЎЙһвӮҠ рҹ’ҡ вӮҠЛҡКҡвҷЎЙһ

Tired of bots with a little to no characters at all? Really short prompts? Boring scenarios? Well worry no more!

I decided to create a bot with easily the 95% of the characters! With an open message for you to start however you like.

All characters are over 18 because of the website rules, it's specifically made for you to have an immersive experience and, obviously, lots of fun!

ЛҡКҡвҷЎЙһвӮҠ рҹ’ҡ вӮҠЛҡКҡвҷЎЙһ

In the characters we have the main cast:

Saiki Kusuo, Teruhashi Kokomi, Kaidou Shun, Kuboyasu Aren, Hairo Kineshi, Nendou Riki, Chisato Mera, Saiko Metori, Aiura Mikoto, Akechi Touma, Yumehara Chiyo and Toritsuka Reita.

Obviously we don't forget about other characters like: Suzumiya Hii, Satou Hiroshi, Nakanishi Kouta (Uryoku Chouno), Ikemi Kazuya (Mr. Ike/Micheal/Chouno's assistant), Yuuta Iridatsu, etc. We even have Soul Shout (the musician from the manga who doesn't appear in the anime but has cameos), isn't that crazy?!

Animals like Anp and Koriki No. 2 are also here!

ЛҡКҡвҷЎЙһвӮҠ рҹ’ҡ вӮҠЛҡКҡвҷЎЙһ

вқ•IMPORTANTвқ•

Due to the massive amount of tokens of this bot it's definitely NOT JanitorLLM friendly. I personally recommend using a proxy with high memory capacity like "DeepSeek 3.1" or "Gemini 2.5"

рҹ©· Update рҹ©·

Finally a Lorebook! Hope it helps with the experience of the bot, I'm just trying to give you guys the best! рҗ”ҢХһ Ьё.Л¬.Ьё ХһрҗҰҜ

ЛҡКҡвҷЎЙһвӮҠ рҹ’ҡ вӮҠЛҡКҡвҷЎЙһ
creator: Hanta_san_
